rules.name: CA_Process_Complete
rules.description: Process/Complete action: validates all cost adjustment lines, applies the adjustment amounts to the product costing records (M_CostingRule / M_Product_Costing), and updates inventory valuation. Creates accounting entries for the cost variance.

rules.name: CA_Update_Product_Cost
rules.description: When the cost adjustment is processed, each line's adjustmentAmount is applied to the product's average cost. The product costing record is updated to reflect the new unit cost after adjustment.

rules.name: CA_Void_Reverse
rules.description: Void action: reverses all cost adjustments applied during processing. Restores the original product costs and reverses the accounting entries.

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields on the header and lines when document status is Completed or Voided. Prevents modification of processed cost adjustments.

rules.name: CA_Line_Validate_Product
rules.description: Validate that the product on the line is a stocked item (productType = 'I') and that inventory transactions exist for it. Non-stocked items or services cannot have cost adjustments.

rules.name: CA_Source_Related_Flag
rules.description: When a cost adjustment line is created, isSource is set to true for manually entered lines. When the system generates cascading adjustments (e.g., BOM components), isRelated is set to true on the generated lines.
